title: Mountain landscape and reference chains
description: The reference mountain chain of this VC is Swiss Alps. The reference mountain landscape of this VC is Canton of Grisons. Grisons is the only tri-lingual canton of Switzerland and economically, culturally and politically very diverse. It is the only place where the Romansh language is spoken. Grisons has more than 900 mountain peaks and 150 valleys, it has typical mountain area and highland landscapes. 41% of the people here live above 1000 masl. The majority is employed in the service sector, tourism is a pillar of the canton's economy. Agriculturally, the farmers cultivate land stretching across the entire Alpine arc, from the grapes and chestnuts in the south to the highest alps and steep slopes down to the Rhine Walley, where all crops grow.
